summary: Completed testing of Account Diagnostic feature (iteration 87). All backend API tests pass (12/12). Frontend diagnostic dialog opens correctly and displays user info, summary stats, trades table, and deposits table. The feature is working correctly in the preview environment.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Backend endpoint /api/admin/members/{user_id}?diagnostic=true returns correct structure with keys: user, summary, trades, deposits, reset_trades
VERIFIED: Frontend handleRunDiagnostic function (lines 415-430) correctly calls the API with diagnostic=true query param
VERIFIED: Diagnostic button is correctly restricted to Master Admin only (line 936: isMasterAdmin())
VERIFIED: Health endpoint returns version '2026.02.11.v3' and diagnostic_enabled: true
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_diagnostic_feature.py - Created new test file for diagnostic feature

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Diagnostic dialog opens and displays data correctly)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Account Diagnostic feature is WORKING. The feature uses query parameter approach: GET /api/admin/members/{user_id}?diagnostic=true. This was chosen because separate routes like /members/{user_id}/diagnostic were causing 404 errors in production. The diagnostic dialog shows: User Information (email, trading type, trading start date, onboarding status), Account Summary (deposits, withdrawals, profit, commission, calculated balance), Recent Trades (last 20), Recent Deposits/Withdrawals (last 20).

verified_features.details: Button visible only for Master Admin, opens diagnostic dialog with data
Shows user info, summary stats, trades table, deposits table

production_deployment_note: After deployment to production, verify: 1) GET /api/health returns version '2026.02.11.v3', 2) This confirms the backend code with diagnostic feature is deployed correctly
